title: The $3,200 Friendship Tax Nobody Talks About
hook: Your friends are quietly one of your biggest hidden expenses — and you've never once questioned it.
angle: Social obligation spending (weddings, group trips, birthday dinners) is an invisible budget-killer nobody categorizes or tracks.
audience: 25-40 year olds in peak social years with active friend groups
key_numbers: $1,000 for ~10 small social events per year
